subject: enel --  rio bravo iv fuel supply agreement

emails.subject: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.subject_base: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.body: ENEL Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement Good suggestions. Take a look at this proposal. I have talked with Julie Smith this morning and they are still interested in transacting with ENA despite the negative press. Thanks, Ruth

emails.subject: RE: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.subject_base: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.body: RE: ENEL Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement Looks good to me.

emails.subject: RE: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.subject_base: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.body: Thanks for your help. The next step is to work on the Tennessee pipeline documents. Hope you have some time or do you want me to coordinate the pipeline stuff with someone else? Ruth

emails.subject: RE: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.subject_base: ENEL --  Rio Bravo IV Fuel Supply Agreement
emails.body: I'll ask Jeff what he thinks.
